title: Micro-branch intent object v0.1
description: Experimental intent record for a single git branch, mirroring the From/To/Route micro-branch postcards pattern. This schema is intentionally small and opinionated: it captures only a branch name, starting situation, intended end state, and the first route toward that end, plus optional tags and timestamps.

schema_version.description: Version of this micro-branch intent object schema. This v0.x line is experimental and may change incompatibly.

branchName.description: Identifier for the branch this intent belongs to, e.g. 'gpt-5-1-micro-branch-intent-schema-v0.1'.

from.description: Terse description of the starting situation or problem for this branch.

to.description: Terse description of the end state that would make this branch feel complete.

route.description: Brief description of the first or primary move from 'from' toward 'to', not a full roadmap.

tags.description: Optional tags for grouping or filtering intent objects, such as area, change type, or mood.

createdAt.description: Optional timestamp for when this intent object was first recorded, in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: Optional timestamp for the most recent update to this intent object, in ISO 8601 format.
